scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: 00fe2c47-42d9-4801-9379-5b83ad7d0000 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] 0.0.0.0 s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] 0.0.0.0 t=0 0 m=audio 0 RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=label:10 a=inactive m=audio 0 RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=label:20 a=inactive

INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 35080 RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=label:10 a=recvonly m=audio 35082 RTP/AVP 8 100 a=fmtp:100 0-15 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:100 telephone-event/8000 a=label:20 a=recvonly

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186684 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 10.133.39.159 b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 0 RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=label:10 a=inactive m=audio 0 RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=label:20 a=inactive

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 4 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186684 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 192.168.55.78 b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 35090 RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=label:10 a=recvonly m=audio 35092 RTP/AVP 0 8 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=label:20 a=recvonly

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: [$us] To: [$them] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 4 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 200 OK Via:[$Bye1Via] From: [$Bye1From] To: [$Bye1To] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: [$Bye1Cseq] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0
